place: Banyan Tree Beach Residences Oceanus, Bang Tao, Choeng Thale, Phuket, Thailand
title: Banyan Tree Oceanus — Beachfront Full-Floor Residence - Bang Tao
blurb: An absolute-beachfront, full-floor residence within Banyan Tree Beach Residences Oceanus — just sixteen homes on one of the last first-line plots on Bang Tao Beach, one expansive home per level, wrapped in uninterrupted Andaman Sea views.
detail:
Banyan Tree Beach Residences Oceanus is an exclusive beachfront collection of just sixteen ultra-luxury homes positioned on one of the last remaining first-line plots along Bang Tao Beach. Its iconic curved façade, inspired by the lines of a private ocean liner, frames uninterrupted Andaman Sea views, and the rare privilege of one expansive residence per level ensures complete privacy. This full-floor home spans approximately 415.94 m² of total area — 317.44 m² of interiors and 82 m² of outdoor terraces — delivering the spatial experience of a standalone villa with the convenience and prestige of a branded beachfront residence.

The signature oceanfront living and dining pavilion spans more than 13 metres, framed by full-height glazing that opens completely to the terrace so the horizon line and ocean breeze become part of the architecture. Natural stone, warm wood, European appliances and bespoke cabinetry reflect Banyan Tree's contemporary philosophy. Four bedroom suites are arranged for privacy: two principal suites face the ocean, each with a private balcony and spa-inspired ensuite, while two guest suites sit in their own wing, and a dedicated study offers space for work or quiet retreat. Functional spaces — open kitchen, prep area, laundry, storage, powder room and car plus buggy parking — are integrated discreetly, with direct lift access to a private foyer reinforcing the full-floor sense of arrival.

Ownership carries an elevated suite of benefits across Banyan Tree and Laguna Phuket: Sanctuary Club privileges for stays, dining and wellness, complimentary membership at Laguna Phuket Golf Club, and a 10-year Banyan Tree Private Collection membership. Set within Asia's leading integrated resort destination, the residence offers direct access to fine dining, spas, beach clubs, marinas, medical facilities and international schools — while remaining part of an intimate, low-density beachfront enclave on Phuket's west coast.
